prompt: Tap flop_mid to confirm the first board anchor.
why_v1: Board anchors keep your adjustment stable across streets.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_mid is the first board anchor, so the texture read stays centered on the card that shapes the flop pattern.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The middle flop card matters because the first full board texture read shows whether cash pressure should stay controlled or start building.
